project.name: flutter_resources2
project.description: Shared Flutter library extending Flutter Resources with reusable widgets, utilities, and helpers for ValeTelecom apps.

nodes.name: build.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that checks out the repo, installs Flutter stable, runs dart run build.dart for analyze and test, and uploads coverage reports to Codecov on every push.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Router skill for Dart/Flutter work in flutter_resources2: requires reading this file first, then topic files by path, and documents dual Cursor/Kimi rule formats plus library coding standards.

nodes.name: codegen.md
nodes.summary: Code-generation topic guide: never edit .g.dart/.freezed.dart files; documents freezed, json_serializable, and mockito regeneration via build_runner or build.dart.

nodes.name: project.md
nodes.summary: Project reference for the shared Flutter library: repository layout under lib/src, barrel-export conventions, sibling flutter-resources deps, and verification/public-API change checklist.

nodes.name: storage.md
nodes.summary: Storage topic guide for lib/src/storage: NBasePersistedField, NPersistedField, NSecurePersistedField patterns, stable keys, and test/storage expectations.

nodes.name: widgets.md
nodes.summary: Widgets topic guide for lib/src/widgets and related modules: form-field patterns, NProvider/DisposeAware/NImage, HookWidget preference, tests, and barrel export rules.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Agent operating rules for this shared Flutter library: role priorities, non-negotiable gates (no silent architecture decisions, no unsolicited commits), code-quality expectations, and the skill router including flutter-dart.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview for Flutter Resources 2 as an extended, less-stable fork of Flutter Resources, with CI, license, and Codecov badges.

nodes.name: analysis_options.yaml
nodes.summary: Dart analyzer and formatter configuration with 100-char page width, generated-file excludes, and a large enabled linter rule set including prefer_relative_imports.

nodes.name: pubspec.yaml
nodes.summary: Package manifest for flutter_resources2: SDK constraint, Flutter and sibling git dependencies from flutter-resources, codegen/test dev_dependencies, and build_runner helper scripts.

nodes.name: flutter-dart.mdc
nodes.summary: Cursor rule with globs for lib/ and test/ Dart files; requires reading the flutter-dart skill before edits and lists library non-negotiables.

nodes.name: flutter-generated.mdc
nodes.summary: Cursor rule forbidding hand-edits of generated Dart outputs (*.g.dart, *.freezed.dart, *.mocks.dart) and pointing to build_runner regeneration.

nodes.name: dart.md
nodes.summary: Kimi-format twin of flutter-dart.mdc: same Dart/Flutter library guardrails with paths and priority frontmatter.

nodes.name: generated.md
nodes.summary: Kimi-format twin of flutter-generated.mdc: do not hand-edit generated Dart; regenerate via build_runner or build.dart.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Explains dual-format project rules (.mdc for Cursor, flutter/*.md for Kimi) and the mapping between twin rule files.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Agent skill for safe renames, deletes, signature changes, large refactors, and dependency additions with before/after re-read gates.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Agent skill for Conventional Commits with explicit-ask gate, pre-commit checks, message format, and rare amend rules.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Agent skill for cross-session memory protocol, .memory files, context management, and self-correction after human fixes.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Agent skill for planning non-trivial work in vertical slices with execution limits, risk notes, and verification steps.

nodes.name: flutter_rules.md
nodes.summary: JetBrains always-apply pointer to flutter-dart skill topics and reminder to keep AGENTS.md synced with general_rules.md.

nodes.name: general_rules.md
nodes.summary: JetBrains twin of AGENTS.md: role, non-negotiable gates, code quality, skill routing table, and communication norms for this library.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents creating the .cursor/rules junction to .agents/rules so Cursor loads project .mdc rules after clone.

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Understand-Anything project config setting English output language and enabling auto-update of the knowledge graph on commit.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore patterns for Understand-Anything analysis, largely mirroring .gitignore-style exclusions for build artifacts and IDE noise.

nodes.name: flutter_resources2.iml
nodes.summary: IntelliJ/Android Studio module descriptor for the flutter_resources2 library project.

nodes.name: build.dart
nodes.summary: CLI build script that runs pub get, build_runner, analyze, and tests with coverage in sequence via Process.run.
nodes.languageNotes: Top-level Dart script using dart:io Process.run with runInShell for Flutter CLI commands.

nodes.name: runCommand
nodes.summary: Runs a shell command, streams stdout/stderr, and exits the process on non-zero status.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that sequentially runs package get, build_runner, analyze, and coverage tests.

nodes.name: flutter_resources2_mobile_only.dart
nodes.summary: Secondary library barrel that re-exports mobile-only utilities for consumers that need platform-specific helpers.

nodes.name: flutter_resources2.dart
nodes.summary: Primary public barrel: re-exports curated third-party packages (with clash hides) and all internal module barrels.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses selective export show/hide to avoid dartx clashes with FR2 fp-style helpers.

nodes.name: adapters.dart
nodes.summary: Adapters module barrel that re-exports platform/store/share wrapper helpers.

nodes.name: wrappers.dart
nodes.summary: Thin wrappers around store_redirect, url_launcher, and share_plus with ShareParams/ShareResult typedefs.

nodes.name: redirectToStore
nodes.summary: Redirects the user to the Android or iOS app store listing for the given app ids.

nodes.name: launchUrl
nodes.summary: Launches a URI externally or in an in-app web view, treating ACTIVITY_NOT_FOUND as a soft false.

nodes.name: share
nodes.summary: Shares content via share_plus using the library ShareParams typedef.

nodes.name: animation_resources.dart
nodes.summary: Animation resources barrel re-exporting NTransitions helpers.

nodes.name: n_transitions.dart
nodes.summary: Static helpers wrapping ScaleTransition, FadeTransition, and SizeTransition for common UI animations.

nodes.name: NTransitions
nodes.summary: Namespace class with static scale, fade, and top-to-bottom expansion transition builders.

nodes.name: chat_bubble.dart
nodes.summary: Stateless chat bubble widget rendering sender, timestamp, and message body with left/right nip alignment.

nodes.name: ChatBubble
nodes.summary: Bubble UI for a ChatMessage, styling fromMe vs incoming with optional sender and timestamp rows.

nodes.name: chat_message.dart
nodes.summary: Freezed ChatMessage model holding sender, timestamp, text/child payload, and fromMe/showSender flags.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses freezed_annotation with part file for generated equality and copyWith.

nodes.name: ChatMessage
nodes.summary: Immutable freezed factory for chat message display data including optional Widget child.

nodes.name: chat_message.freezed.dart
nodes.summary: Generated Freezed implementation for ChatMessage (copyWith, equality, pattern helpers); do not hand-edit.
nodes.languageNotes: Auto-generated by freezed; regenerate via build_runner.

nodes.name: chat_resources.dart
nodes.summary: Barrel re-exporting the bubble package plus Chat, ChatBubble, and ChatMessage chat UI modules.

nodes.name: chat.dart
nodes.summary: Scrollable chat layout widget with a reverse message list, empty-state overlay, and optional composer with validation and loading send button.

nodes.name: classes.dart
nodes.summary: Barrel re-exporting Disposable, NMessenger, and NWrapper utility classes.

nodes.name: disposable.dart
nodes.summary: Abstract Disposable extending get_it Disposable with a factory that wraps a dispose callback.

nodes.name: n_messenger.dart
nodes.summary: Static global messenger helpers for snackbars and dialogs via ScaffoldMessenger and Navigator keys, including SimpleAlert without a BuildContext.

nodes.name: n_wrapper.dart
nodes.summary: Generic value wrapper that overrides equality via an optional comparator without changing the wrapped type.

nodes.name: dialogs.dart

nodes.name: widgets.dart
nodes.summary: Barrel export for the widgets module, re-exporting all public form fields, navigation, image, and provider widgets.

layers.name: Public API
layers.description: Package entry-point barrel files that re-export the library surface for consumers (main and mobile-only).

layers.name: Widgets & UI
layers.description: Reusable Flutter widgets, dialogs, list views, animations, and HTML rendering helpers under lib/src.

layers.name: Chat
layers.description: Chat UI and message models: bubbles, chat widgets, and Freezed chat message types.

layers.name: Search
layers.description: Search delegates, input search bar, and suggestion models for in-app search UX.

layers.name: Storage
layers.description: Persisted field abstractions (base, Hive-backed, and secure) for typed local storage.

layers.name: Utils & Foundations
layers.description: Shared utilities, Dart/Flutter extensions, FP types, failure/exception types, disposable/messenger classes, and adapter wrappers.

layers.name: Agent Tooling & Docs
layers.description: Agent skills, IDE/assistant rules, project governance (AGENTS.md), and human-facing README documentation.

layers.name: CI & Config
layers.description: CI workflows, package/pubspec and analyzer config, build script, IDE project files, and Understand-Anything analyzer config.

tour.title: What is Flutter Resources 2?
tour.description: Start here: Flutter Resources 2 is a shared Flutter library that extends the sibling Flutter Resources packages with reusable widgets, utilities, and helpers. The README frames it as an extended, less-stable fork; pubspec.yaml shows the package identity, SDK constraints, and git dependencies on core_resources and related sibling packages. Keep this mental model: consumers depend on a curated public surface, not on app-specific business logic.
tour.languageLesson: In Dart packages, pubspec.yaml is the package contract (name, SDK, dependencies); the README is the human-facing orientation, not the API surface.

tour.title: The public API barrels
tour.description: Consumers import package:flutter_resources2/flutter_resources2.dart. That primary barrel re-exports curated third-party packages (with clash hides) and every internal module barrel under lib/src. A secondary entry, flutter_resources2_mobile_only.dart, exposes dart:io helpers that must stay off the web compile path. When you add a new public type, export it through its module barrel and then through this primary file.
tour.languageLesson: Dart library barrels are export-only files: they re-export other libraries so consumers get one import path without reaching into lib/src.

tour.title: Repository layout and contribution rules
tour.description: Implementation lives under lib/src/<module>/ with a module barrel (e.g. widgets.dart, storage.dart) that the public entry re-exports. The project skill documents layout, barrel conventions, sibling flutter-resources deps, and the public-API change checklist. AGENTS.md sets library priorities: correctness, maintainability, small APIs, and no silent architectural decisions. Read these before changing exports or module boundaries.

tour.title: Utils and foundations
tour.description: The utils module is the shared toolkit: image helpers, Flutter Hooks utilities, platform detection (NApp), streams, URLs, and widget focus helpers. The utils.dart barrel is what the public API re-exports. Prefer these helpers over duplicating platform or image logic in feature widgets. Mobile-only File/test-environment helpers live separately so the main package stays web-safe.

tour.title: Extensions, failures, and FP types
tour.description: Cross-cutting Dart/Flutter extensions (string, iterable, context, widget, time, and more) live under extensions/. Error modeling uses NFailure and NException; fp_types.dart typedefs Either/TaskEither specialized on NFailure for library-wide functional error handling. Classes such as Disposable, NMessenger, and NWrapper round out the foundation. Learn this layer before reading feature modules that return TaskEither or show snackbars without a BuildContext.
tour.languageLesson: Either and TaskEither are functional error-handling types: success and failure are values, not thrown exceptions, which makes composition and testing more predictable.

tour.title: Reusable widgets
tour.description: The widgets module is a core product surface: form fields (date, time, date-time, item select) built on TextFormFieldButton; NImage for unified network/asset/memory images; NProvider for hook-based scoped instances with Disposable cleanup; DisposeAware for dispose callbacks; and NBottomNav for Material 3 navigation with badges. Prefer HookWidget patterns here. The widgets skill documents form-field patterns, barrel export rules, and test expectations.

tour.title: Lists, dialogs, and motion
tour.description: Companion UI modules sit beside widgets: listresources provides NListView and NSliverList; dialogs exposes selection dialogs used by item-select form fields; animationresources wraps common Scale/Fade/Size transitions. HTML rendering helpers live under htmlrenderresources. Together with widgets, these form the Widgets & UI layer consumers reach through the public barrel.

tour.title: Typed local storage
tour.description: Storage centers on persisted fields: NBasePersistedField is the abstract Hive-backed field with serialize/deserialize hooks and a reactive ValueStream; NPersistedField covers unsecured typed values; NSecurePersistedField adds AES encryption with keys in FlutterSecureStorage. Use stable keys and the patterns in the storage skill. Export path: storage.dart → flutter_resources2.dart.

tour.title: Chat UI and message models
tour.description: Chat resources provide a scrollable Chat layout (reverse list, empty state, optional composer), ChatBubble for left/right nip alignment, and a Freezed ChatMessage model (sender, timestamp, text/child, fromMe). chat_resources.dart is the module barrel. The .freezed.dart file is generated — never hand-edit it; regenerate via build_runner or build.dart.
tour.languageLesson: Freezed generates immutable data classes with copyWith, equality, and pattern helpers from a short annotated source file; the companion .freezed.dart is output, not source of truth.

tour.title: In-app search UX
tour.description: Search resources wrap in-app search: NBasicSearchDelegate, NInputSearchBar, and a Freezed NSearchSuggestion model. The search_resources.dart barrel is re-exported from the public API alongside the sibling search_resources package. Use this module when you need consistent search UI rather than ad-hoc SearchDelegate subclasses in each app.

tour.title: Build, analyze, and CI
tour.description: Local verification runs through build.dart: pub get, build_runner, analyze, and tests with coverage. GitHub Actions (.github/workflows/build.yml) installs Flutter stable, runs the same script, and uploads coverage to Codecov. analysis_options.yaml enforces formatter width and a strict linter set including prefer_relative_imports. Treat this pipeline as the gate before any public-API change.
